title: SPV Participation Agreement
description: An agreement for investors joining a Special Purpose Vehicle to pool capital for a single startup investment.
whatsCovered: Investor capital contribution to the SPV
SPV management fees and carry distribution splits
Syndicate manager authority and proxy voting rules
Transfer restrictions on SPV membership units
whenToUse: Use this participation agreement when setting up or joining a syndicate SPV (e.g. AngelList syndicate) to invest in a specific target startup.

fields.label: Company Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovators Blvd, San Francisco, CA

fields.label: SPV Manager / Syndicate Lead
fields.placeholder: e.g. Blue Lake Capital Syndicate Management LLC

fields.label: SPV Entity Name
fields.placeholder: e.g. Blue Lake SPV — CyberFlow Series A

clauses.heading: SPV PARTICIPATION AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This startup agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and the counterparty or stakeholders executing this document below.

clauses.heading: 1. Core Agreement Terms
clauses.body: This agreement sets out the transaction and operational terms for SPV Participation Agreement. The parties agree to coordinate in good faith to complete milestones, share resources, or grant rights as specified.

clauses.heading: 2. Capital Pool and Carry Fees
clauses.body: Investor agrees to contribute {contribution_amount} to {spv_name}. SPV Manager {spv_manager} shall receive carried interest equal to {carry_percentage}% of SPV investment profits.

clauses.heading: 3. Proprietary Information and Secrecy
clauses.body: Both parties agree to treat all financial metrics, corporate plans, cap tables, and research files received during the execution of this Agreement as confidential and proprietary.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: What is carried interest (carry)?
faq.answer: It is the percentage of profits (standard is 20%) paid to the SPV manager upon a successful exit of the target startup.

faq.question: Do SPV investors get direct board seats?
faq.answer: No, the SPV manager represents the pooled entity, keeping the target startup's capitalization table clean.
